positive: A vibrant, stylized tropical jungle scene with large, exaggerated banana leaves and vibrant orchids, arranged in a repeating, seamless pattern. The style should be inspired by Art Deco illustration and modern woodblock prints, featuring bold, graphic lines and limited but rich color palettes of teal, emerald green, ochre yellow, and deep magenta. The composition must be centered, symmetrical, and designed to fill a square area perfectly, showcasing strong silhouettes and high contrast between foliage layers. Ideal for a repetitive fabric print on apparel.
negative: low resolution, blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, messy, grain, noise, bad anatomy, deformed, cartoonish, realistic photography, gradient, faded, muted colors
